creator: araujo@bsdmail.org
text:
Hi,
Accepted!

Regards!

> ----- Original Message -----
> From: "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> To: araujo@bsdmail.org

take maintainership
> Date: Sun, 29 Apr 2007 03:50:54 UT
>=20
>=20
> Maintainer of graphics/mesa-demos,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/112226 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/112226
>=20
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
